name: $0 Launch Stack
tagline: Launch a real product with zero monthly costs
description: Every tool in this stack has a free tier generous enough to get to your first 100 users without spending a cent. Chosen for absolute minimum friction.

tools.note: Free tier handles millions of requests. Deploy from GitHub in seconds.
Free tier includes 500MB database, 50K monthly active users, and S3-compatible storage.
3,000 free emails/month. More than enough until you have real users.
Unlimited free forms and submissions. Use for onboarding, feedback, support.
30-day free trial. After that $9/mo — but you should be making money by then.
Free tier for solo use. Run your entire business: roadmap, notes, CRM.
Free tier covers all marketing assets, social posts, pitch decks.

name: 1-Day MVP Stack
tagline: Ship a working product in under 24 hours
description: This stack is optimized for speed above all else. Every tool was chosen because you can be productive in under an hour. No config rabbit holes, no YAML hell, no waiting for approvals.

tools.note: AI-first editor. Tab-complete entire functions, refactor with natural language. 10x faster than vanilla VSCode for greenfield work.
Push to GitHub, live in 30 seconds. No CI/CD config needed. Preview deployments built in.
Pre-built sign-up/sign-in UI in minutes. 10K free MAU. No auth code to write.
Postgres + Storage in one dashboard. No server to configure. Auto-generated REST API.
Copy-paste API key, send email in 5 minutes. React Email templates make welcome emails look professional instantly.
Best-in-class docs. Copy the quickstart, have a working checkout in 45 minutes.
Build a waitlist form in 2 minutes without touching code. Embed in your landing page.
Keyboard-first. Zero setup time. Create issues fast so nothing falls through the cracks when you're moving this quickly.

name: Automation-First Stack
tagline: Eliminate repetitive work before it accumulates
description: Solo founders lose hours to repetitive tasks: onboarding emails, support triage, social scheduling, status updates. This stack eliminates the highest-leverage manual work first.

tools.note: Connect your apps visually. Trigger Make scenarios from Stripe webhooks, form submissions, or new signups — no code required.
Trigger onboarding sequences, payment receipts, churn-prevention flows via API. Pair with Make for zero-code automation.
Automated welcome sequence, referral program, and boosts all built-in. Set it up once, it runs itself.
Schedule a week of tweets in one sitting. Auto-plug threads as newsletter content. Reclaim 2-3 hours/week of manual posting.
Chatbot handles FAQ at 3am. Knowledge base deflects repeat questions. You only touch real issues.
Weekly email digest lands in your inbox automatically. No manual reporting, no dashboard-checking habit needed.
Automated tax collection, dunning emails, failed payment retries. Revenue ops on autopilot.
